creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Fri Jan 18 12:35:17 2013
New Revision: 310600
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310600

Log:
  - Update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite to 3.2.4

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

-PORTVERSION=	3.2.3
